title: Bootstrap 95% CIs on H1 test Spearman
method: 1000 bootstrap resamples of the H1 test set (n=377 days), compute Spearman on each, report 95% CI
headline: Bootstrap CIs are honest: SPY and XLK have CIs that don't include 0 (significant). XLF, XLV, XLE have CIs that include 0 (not significant at 5% level). This is more honest than reporting only p-values. The cascade is significant on 2/5 US assets at the 5% level with bootstrap.
